generated_oml:
instance BuildingSystem : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Cyber-physical asset in AECO domain, exemplified by buildings with integrated static models and runtime data for simulation, analysis, and optimization across the complete building life cycle from initial design to refurbishments and operation."
]

instance BIMModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Building Information Modeling for device modeling of sensors, actuators, and controllers, establishing a unified semantic foundation."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MDEEnabler
]

instance MDEEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-Driven Engineering process transforming enriched BIM models into structured representations and deployable DT artifacts."
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, PredictiveAnalyticsService, SimulationService, OptimizationService, DecisionMakingService
]

instance ModularArchitectureEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Modular architecture with standardized extension points for integrating custom services and analytics."
    DTDFVocab:enables PredictiveAnalyticsService, DecisionMakingService
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time insights for monitoring system states and operating physical infrastructure via interactive visualization."
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeMonitoringInsight
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics for infrastructure management."
    DTDFVocab:provides PredictiveAnalyticsInsight
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulation capabilities for building performance analysis."
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationInsight
]

instance OptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimization for operational efficiency across building lifecycle."
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimizationInsight
]

instance DecisionMakingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Enhanced decision-making capabilities for data-driven infrastructure management."
    DTDFVocab:provides DecisionMakingInsight
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of system states for Facility Managers via interactive visualization."
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive insights for infrastructure management."
]

instance SimulationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Simulation results for building performance analysis."
]

instance OptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimization recommendations for operational efficiency."
]

instance DecisionMakingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Enhanced decision-making capabilities for data-driven infrastructure management."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The lifecycle encompasses initial BIM-based device modeling (sensors, actuators, controllers), Model-Driven Engineering (MDE) transformation to structured representations and deployable artifacts, real-time data synchronization, interactive visualization for monitoring and control, and modular extension points enabling evolution through custom services integration. Role-based governance involves Building Control Engineers for modeling, Facility Managers for operation monitoring, and DT Engineers for service development."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Standardized extension points are utilized for modular architecture to integrate custom services and analytics. However, no specific industry standards, specifications, certification requirements, or interoperability frameworks are explicitly referenced in the document."
]
